title: Sensor Export Row
description: Schema for a single row in the sensor_sample training data export CSV. Each row represents one sensor measurement from the unified sensor_sample table.

recorded_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the measurement was recorded.

user_id.description: UUID of the user who owns this measurement.

provider_id.description: Identifier of the data provider (e.g., wahoo, apple_health, intervals).

device_id.description: Identifier of the device that produced this measurement, or null if unknown.

source_type.description: How the data was ingested: BLE sensor, file import, or API sync.

channel.description: The measurement channel name (e.g., heart_rate, power, imu, orientation).

activity_id.description: UUID of the associated activity, or null if not linked to an activity.

activity_type.description: Activity type label from the joined activity table (e.g., cycling, hiking), or null.

scalar.description: Single numeric value for scalar channels (heart_rate, power, etc.), or null for vector channels.

vector.description: String representation of a numeric array for vector channels (e.g., '{0.1,0.2,9.8}'), or null for scalar channels.
